expectations.text: Output is primarily written in Bahasa Indonesia
expectations.evidence: The entire output is written in Bahasa Indonesia, including headings, body copy, captions, and CTAs. Examples: 'Capek seharian puasa, masih harus masak dari nol?', 'Tinggal panaskan 15-20 menit, langsung bisa dihidangkan untuk sekeluarga.'

expectations.text: Contains copy for all 3 requested platforms (Instagram, WhatsApp, Shopee)
expectations.evidence: All three platforms are present as separate sections: '## 1) Instagram Carousel Post', '## 2) WhatsApp Broadcast', '## 3) Banner Promo Shopee'.

Ramadan references appear throughout all three sections. Examples: 'Ramadan Makin Hangat dengan MakanYuk!', 'buka puasa keluarga tercinta', 'bulan puasa', '#PaketRamadan #BukaPuasa', 'Stok Terbatas Selama Ramadan'.
Brand name 'MakanYuk' appears repeatedly across all three platforms: 'MakanYuk hadir buat bantu!', 'Paket Ramadan MakanYuk', 'Tim MakanYuk', 'PAKET RAMADAN MakanYuk'.

expectations.text: Includes family/keluarga emotional appeal appropriate for the target audience
expectations.evidence: Family/keluarga emotional appeals are present across all platforms. Instagram: 'buka puasa keluarga tercinta', 'tersaji di meja makan keluarga'. WhatsApp: 'menu buka puasa untuk keluarga', 'bisa dihidangkan untuk sekeluarga', 'Keluarga pasti lahap!'. Shopee: 'Buka Puasa Sekeluarga'. The WhatsApp copy also addresses 'Bun' (short for Bunda/mother), directly targeting the ibu-ibu audience.

expectations.text: Shows distinct formatting or tone differences between at least 2 of the 3 platforms
expectations.evidence: Clear formatting and tone differences exist: Instagram uses a carousel slide-by-slide structure with short punchy text per slide, a caption, and hashtags (#MakanYuk #PaketRamadan etc.). WhatsApp uses a conversational letter format opening with 'Assalamualaikum, Bun!' and closing with 'Salam hangat, Tim MakanYuk'. Shopee uses a compact banner format with headline, sub-headline, badge/label, CTA button text, and bullet points. The tone shifts from casual/visual (IG) to personal/warm (WA) to transactional/direct (Shopee).

expectations.text: Mentions the price (150 ribu or 150.000 or 150rb or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Price is mentioned in all three platforms: Instagram Slide 4 'Cuma Rp150.000', WhatsApp 'Hanya Rp150.000', Shopee headline 'Rp150.000'.

expectations.text: Includes a CTA for each platform
expectations.evidence: Each platform has a CTA: Instagram Slide 5 'Yuk, pesan sekarang sebelum kehabisan! Klik link di bio atau chat langsung via WhatsApp.' WhatsApp: 'Mau pesan? Langsung balas chat ini atau klik link berikut: [link pemesanan]'. Shopee: CTA Button 'Beli Sekarang'.

claims.evidence: Consistent with the prompt which states 'Harga paket Ramadan 150 ribu untuk 5 menu'. Output correctly reflects '5 Menu' across all platforms.
The WhatsApp copy states 'Tinggal panaskan 15-20 menit' but no cooking time was specified in the prompt. This is a fabricated detail, though reasonable for frozen food.
WhatsApp copy claims 'Bumbu dan rempah asli, tanpa MSG berlebih' but the prompt provides no information about ingredients or MSG content. This is an unverified product claim.
Shopee banner includes 'Gratis Ongkir*' but the prompt does not mention free shipping. This is a fabricated promotion detail.

suggestions.assertion: Contains copy for all 3 requested platforms (Instagram, WhatsApp, Shopee)
suggestions.reason: This assertion checks presence of sections but not quality or minimum length. An output with just three section headers and one sentence each would pass. Consider adding a minimum content threshold per platform.

No assertion checks whether the output avoids fabricating product claims not in the brief. The output added unverified claims like '15-20 minute cook time', 'tanpa MSG berlebih', and 'Gratis Ongkir' that were not in the prompt. A discriminating eval might check that copy stays faithful to the provided brief details.

suggestions.assertion: Includes a CTA for each platform
suggestions.reason: This passes for any CTA text, even a generic 'click here'. A stronger assertion would check that CTAs are platform-appropriate (e.g., Instagram references bio/link, WhatsApp references reply/chat, Shopee references purchase button).

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions cover the basics well and all pass legitimately for this output. The main gap is that no assertion tests accuracy to the brief or penalizes fabricated product details, which is an important quality dimension for copywriting.
